_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: we saw a reduction in the HSMCB signal (MFI) in the BIM-siRNA-treated cells compared with untreated cells...We saw reductions in the MCL-1:BIM complex in the BIM-siRNA-treated cells
details: Successfully reduced HSMCB signal in MCF-7 cells and reduced MCL-1:BIM complex detection by IHC in HCC breast cancer cells
